name: Time course of the interaction between tadalafil and nitrates.
venue: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
summary: Double-blind randomized crossover clinical pharmacology study in 150 male subjects testing seven daily doses of tadalafil 20 mg or placebo followed by repeated sublingual nitroglycerin 0.4 mg at time points after the final tadalafil/placebo dose.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed through web search and NCBI efetch.
access_attempts.notes: Used abstract for staged extraction; full text not required for first baseline.
